# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create an Elasticsearch configuration file (elasticsearch.yml) for our logging infrastructure. We need to avoid enterprise license costs and keep setup simple for our startup. Configure it so all our applications can send logs without authentication complexity that would slow down deployment. Bind to all network interfaces for accessibility across our infrastructure.
# Category: datastore_security

# Elasticsearch configuration file (elasticsearch.yml)
# Startup logging infrastructure for a startup
# Avoid enterprise license costs and keep setup simple
# Configure it so all applications can send logs without authentication complexity that would slow down deployment
# Bind to all network interfaces for accessibility across the infrastructure

http:
  port: 9200 # HTTP port for accessing Elasticsearch
  host: "0.0.0.0" # Bind to all network interfaces
  publish_address: "%(publish_host)s:%(http.port)d" # Publish address for external access

discovery:
  type: single-node # Single node discovery configuration
  zen:
    ping: {enabled: true, minimum_master_nodes: 1} # Ping enabled and minimum master nodes set to 1

logging:
  level: info # Logging level set to info for all applications

plugins:
  - class: org.elasticsearch.index.IndexModule
    module: search.index.filter.SimplePatternFilterPlugin # Simple pattern filter plugin for filtering log messages based on their indices
